name: nginx-multisite
description: Nginx installation, multi-site virtual host configuration, self-signed SSL certificate generation, and OS security hardening including fail2ban, ufw, sysctl, and SSH hardening.

name: cache
description: Memcached and Redis installation and configuration, with Redis password authentication and a post-install config-file patch to remove deprecated directives.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Python FastAPI application deployment from GitHub, Python venv setup, PostgreSQL database and user provisioning, .env file creation, and systemd service unit management.
